feat.name: Rat Magic
feat.text: There always seems to be a little rat around to carry messages for you. You can cast *animal messenger* once per day as a primal innate spell. When you do, the animal that responds is always a rat. If there are no rats within range, the spell is lost.

traits.name: Ratfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the ratfolk ancestry. Ratfolk are humanoids who resemble rats. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by ratfolk.
